title: LLM / model provider
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-001", "Dependency": "LLM / model provider", "Type": "External service (abstracted)", "Criticality": "Critical", "Notes": "Reached only through a vendor-neutral model port (`ADR-0003` boundary; `ASM-004`). title: Email system / mailbox / queue
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-002", "Dependency": "Email system / mailbox / queue", "Type": "External service", "Criticality": "Critical", "Notes": "Source of inbound email (`FR-001`) and the send channel (gated by `FR-006` / `INV-001`). Test double required for non-prod."}}

title: Knowledge base / retrieval source
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-003", "Dependency": "Knowledge base / retrieval source", "Type": "External service / data source", "Criticality": "Critical", "Notes": "Supplies grounding context (`FR-003`); citation-or-defer (`INV-002`) depends on it. title: Human-review queue / ticketing system
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-004", "Dependency": "Human-review queue / ticketing system", "Type": "External service", "Criticality": "Critical", "Notes": "Receives drafts for approval and escalations (`FR-005`, `FR-006`). The HITL gate (`ADR-0001`) writes here."}}
